# NYC Weather — nycweather.app

Real-time weather data for all five New York City boroughs, updated every 10 minutes.

## Pages

- / — NYC weather overview, all 5 boroughs side by side
- /manhattan — Manhattan weather today
- /brooklyn — Brooklyn weather today
- /queens — Queens weather today
- /bronx — The Bronx weather today
- /staten-island — Staten Island weather today

## Data

Each borough page includes:
- Current temperature (°F)
- Feels like temperature
- High / Low for the day
- Weather description
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed (mph) and direction

## Notes

- Data sourced from OpenWeatherMap API
- Updated every 10 minutes via Next.js ISR (revalidate: 600)
- Each borough uses precise lat/lon coordinates for accurate local readings
- NYC boroughs have distinct microclimates — this site tracks each individually
